series_metadata.series_description: The Mobile Field Force (MFF) Mission Files consist of any or all the following form documents and any supporting documentation used to compile the forms or to document any functions related to the forms or missions: Mobile Field Force Warning Order (OHP 0010) and Mobile Field Force Operations Order (OHP 0011).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain current, plus two (2) years following execution of the operation and closing of the file. Records are retained in the Office of Field Operations – MFF. Paper files may be destroyed once scanned and saved to file. ; Electronic: Retain current, plus two (2) years following execution of the operation and closing of the file. Records are retained in the Office of Field Operations – MFF., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
